title: helichrysum glomeratum
intro: Helichrysum glomeratum, also known as the sticky curry or ball-headed helichrysum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum glomeratum have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and relieving digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the body's natural healing processes and promote overall well-being.
